en: Homophones are words that have the same pronunciation but have different meanings or spellings
ko: 동음이의어는 같은 발음이지만 의미나 철자가 다른 단어야.

en: Eight I ate a banana for a snack Or the number eight
ko: Eight. I ate a banana for a snack. 또는 숫자 eight.

en: New could mean that you bought a new car Or you could be talking about something
ko: New는 new car를 샀다는 뜻일 수도 있고. 또는 새로

en: that you found out about Something that you now know I knew about the problem you had at work
ko: 알게 된 것일 수도 있어. 이제 아는 것. I knew about the problem you had at work.
